description_long: This is a pair of sporty, rectangular sunglasses with a robust, full-rim frame. The frame is thick and solid, predominantly black, and features bold, graphic text and patterns along the temples. The lenses are a deep red tint, providing a striking contrast to the dark frame and likely offering strong sun protection. The temples are straight with a slight curve at the ends for a secure fit, and they display the word 'TAIWAN' in large, colorful letters, along with additional white graphic elements. The bridge is a simple, integrated design that connects the two lenses seamlessly. These sunglasses are visually dynamic and designed for both style and function in urban environments.
description: Sporty, rectangular sunglasses with a thick black frame, deep red lenses, and bold graphic text on the temples.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular red lenses and the solid, thick black frame.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the 'TAIWAN' text and white graphic on the temple, as well as the curve of the arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inside of the frame and the full length of both temples with visible graphics.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the mirrored 'TAIWAN' text and white graphic on the opposite temple.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, full-rim frame with thick, straight temples and a robust, sporty structure. The frame is solid and angular, providing a bold and modern appearance.
attribute_lens_tint: Deep red tint, fully opaque with no visible gradient or mirrored effect. The lenses appear uniform in color and provide strong visual contrast.
attribute_bridge_style: Simple, integrated bridge with a straight, solid connection between the lenses. No separate nose pads or keyhole features are visible.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are thick and straight with a slight curve at the ends. Both temples feature large, colorful 'TAIWAN' text and additional white graphic elements, giving a distinctive and eye-catching look.
attribute_brand_logo: A brand logo or insignia is visible as the word 'TAIWAN' printed in large, colorful letters on both temples.
